heading: Discharge or release from active duty: transition assistance for reserve component members injured while on active duty
label: 1218a Discharge or release from active duty: transition assistance for reserve component members injured while on active duty

children.text: Information on the availability of care and administrative processing through community based warrior transition units.
Information on the location of the community based warrior transition unit located nearest to the permanent place of residence of the member.

children.heading: .—Covered Members
children.label: b .—Covered Members
children.text: Subsection (a) applies to members of a reserve component who are injured while on active duty in the armed forces.
